title.zh: Markra - WYSIWYG Markdown 编辑器贡献

zh: 修复编辑器模式切换时滚动进度丢失的问题 (#226, #227)
A WYSIWYG Markdown 编辑器，支持本地 AI，完全开源，数据留存在本地
en: Fixed scroll progress not being preserved when switching between editor modes (#226, #227)
A WYSIWYG Markdown editor with native AI. Fully open source, free to use, data stays local.
